abilities.name: Advanced Sights
abilities.text: This model receives a (+) when targeting models at a lower elevation.

abilities.name: Eyes on Every Angle
abilities.text: Familia tokens on this model ignore range (but not LoS).

abilities.name: From Shadow
abilities.text: This model is deployed during the start phase of turn 1 anywhere on the table, not within 2" of a Strategy marker or enemy deployment zone.

actions.name: Repeating Rifle
actions.costs_and_restrictions: If there are no different enemy models within 4" of the target, this action receives a (+).

triggers.name: Line Up the Shot
triggers.text: Declare this action again, drawing range and LoS from the target.

triggers.name: Critical Strike
triggers.text: When resolving, this action deals +1 damage to the target.

triggers.name: Spotter
triggers.text: Another ally in LoS may move up to 3".

triggers.name: Vantage Point
triggers.text: Enemy only. Make a Scheme marker anywhere in the area between this model and the target.

triggers.name: Draw Their Attention
triggers.text: A friendly model in this model's LoS may discard a card to declare the Interact action.

actions.name: Drawn to Family
actions.effects: This model gains a Familia token and moves up to 2" toward an ally in LoS.
